title: Getaran di Tepi Kanal
theme: Sebuah eksplorasi mengenai bagaimana sensasi fisik yang misterius bisa menjadi manifestasi dari kecemasan atau kenangan psikologis yang belum terselesaikan, mendorong karakter untuk introspeksi mendalam.

cover.prompt: Cinematic wide shot of a tranquil canal at golden hour, its calm waters reflecting the soft, warm sky. A gently textured pathway runs alongside, lined with graceful willow trees and sturdy old buildings of classic architecture. A distant, out-of-focus silhouette of a person moves along the path, suggesting a peaceful ritual. Emphasize leading lines and a sense of depth, with warm color grading.
cover.style: Cinematic photography, shallow depth of field, warm color grading

meta.plan_summary: Anya experiences mysterious physical vibrations during her runs by a canal. Initially confused and anxious, she searches for external causes without success. During a particularly strong vibration, she realizes it's an internal manifestation of a suppressed childhood memory—a forgotten near-drowning accident at that exact spot. She resolves to use this 'alarm' as a guide for self-discovery and accepting past trauma.
meta.target_emotion: Introspeksi, ketenangan setelah ketegangan, pemahaman diri
